title: The Depths Below The Deep
description: An Expansion Mod based around the Deep Dark!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb22c5f0e464251012c8a1212c60f2b4ba038d6d.png)
### Adds a new type of food ![food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bb5578584975d02d0dfe78bdc2703b3d98cc56a.png)
How to craft Type of food corrisponds to the sculk type ![food crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd33ad70364c560bc982c3e1030469439dccab9.png)
### Adds three new type of blocks #### Dimented Blocks - Semi-living Blocks Infected by Sculk - Examples include Grass Blocks, Podzol and Rooted Dirt - Found in the Deep Dark ![Dimented Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca0ef6484df13e8b5619a80213836d51b32909d8.png) #### Criteric Blocks - Living Blocks Fully Infected by Sculk - Examples include Leaves, Vines and Moss - Found in the Deep Dark ![Criteric Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2022ae3c886c58dc097d2ccb414e9a54004522e.png) #### Infurtrinated Blocks - Rock like Blocks Infected by Sculk - Examples include Stone, Deepslate, and Diorite - Found in the Deep Dark ![Infurtrinated Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63e8686ec28c5af0b833dfe2f8debea590773b07_0.webp)Infurtrinated #### Infurtrinated Boned Blocks - Bone Blocks Fully Infected by Sculk - This only includes Bone - Found in the Deep Dark ![Infurtrinated Boned Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b680c677c59a414cff9a4aec0710845eabb7855.png) #### Echoing Blocks - Gem Blocks Fully Infected by Sculk - This only includes Amethyst - Found in the Deep Dark ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00aeef1b758aed8c60e8357054b4831c75b56ac2.png) ### Adds a set of tools ![tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d733cd9a78b96741bbbaec1febd3f107314611.png) ### Adds a type of armor ![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8FoeSKC1/images/a4ea71462c6eb8f68b123a89783c0d2ae856f16c.png)
